title: Synthetic Organization Governance Brief

summary: Synthetic organization used to demonstrate Mirai Graph governance structure.

summary: Strategy to improve customer operations through measured, governed process changes.

summary: Portfolio grouping operational improvement programs and projects.

title: Service Team

summary: Policy requiring owner approval before workflow changes become canonical.

title: Review Delay Days

title: Review Delay Feedback
summary: Feedback that review delay is improving but approval clarity remains uneven.

title: Clarify Approval Path
